chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4548 of 2024 C.P. No.D-4549 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 06.10.2025 Mr. Imran Ali Pirzada, advocate for petitioner ------------------------------------------- The main grievance of the petitioners is that they are not being appointed as Police Constable and they have made departmental appeals/representations (at Pages 45 to 49 of C.P. No.D-4548/2024 and Pages 39 to 43 of C.P. No.D- 4549/2024), which was received on 12.09.2024 and 01.09.2024 at Central Police Office, Karachi. Deputy Inspector General of Police Sindh concerned is directed to decide the appeals/representations of the petitioners within three months of the date of this order, after giving a right to be heard to the petitioners, through a speaking order. However, a copy of this order shall be sent to the Deputy Inspector General of Police Sindh concerned along with Pages 45 to 49 of C.P. No.D-4548/2024 and Pages 39 to 43 of C.P. No.D-4549/2024, for information and compliance. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
